headline: ₹50-200 Cr at risk (market cap volatility, not ESG-driven) — Waaree Energies shares drop 15% amid market caution, triggering investor concern but no direct ESG event.
what_matters: No new framework breaches or regulatory deadlines; BRSR, GRI, TCFD relevance only theoretical.
No P/E compression or margin erosion attributable to ESG; revenue at risk is N/A.
No immediate cost of capital impact or bond spread change; FII flows unaffected.
